kamino.title: Kamino — Your loan
kamino.noPosition: You don't have an active loan on Kamino yet.
kamino.noPositionHint: When you do, Nudge translates everything for you.

explain.collateral: Tokens you deposited as collateral on Kamino
explain.margin: How much margin you have before risk
explain.netValue: What's left if you pay everything back now

safe.gentle: Your Kamino loan is safe. Your collateral is worth {{margin}}% more than your debt. Relax.
safe.encouraging: Great news! Your Kamino loan is healthy. {{margin}}% margin — keep it up!
safe.technical: HF: {{hf}}. Margin: {{margin}}%. Nominal LTV. No risk.

attention.gentle: Your Kamino loan needs a bit of attention. Your margin is at {{margin}}% — let's look at what to do together.
attention.encouraging: Your Kamino loan is in attention zone. {{margin}}% margin — you can improve! Check the actions below.
attention.direct: Attention: margin dropping to {{margin}}%. Health Factor: {{hf}}. Consider adding collateral.
attention.technical: HF: {{hf}}. Margin: {{margin}}%. LTV rising. Monitor proactively.

danger.gentle: Your Kamino loan deserves your attention. Margin is at {{margin}}% — but it's fixable. See below.
danger.encouraging: Let's take care of your Kamino loan together! {{margin}}% margin. You have the tools — see below.
danger.direct: Elevated risk. Margin: {{margin}}%. Health Factor: {{hf}}. Add collateral or reduce debt.
danger.technical: HF: {{hf}}. Critical LTV. Margin: {{margin}}%. Liquidation possible if HF reaches 1.0.

education.title: HEALTH FACTOR (HF)
education.subtitle: The number that protects your loan
education.whatIsHF: The Health Factor (HF) measures how protected your Kamino loan is. The higher the number, the safer you are. If it reaches 1.0, your collateral can be automatically sold (liquidation).

liquidation.label: Liquidation
liquidation.desc: Collateral sold automatically by the protocol

actions.addCollateral: Adding more collateral increases your HF and moves you away from liquidation
actions.reduceDebt: Paying down part of the debt reduces LTV and improves your margin
actions.monitor: Monitor closely when the market is volatile

chave-wallet.name: Wallet Key
chave-wallet.description: Your first step. You introduced yourself to Nudge.
chave-wallet.howToGet: Complete the profile quiz during onboarding.

mapa-kamino.name: Kamino Map
mapa-kamino.description: You saw your data for the first time. Knowledge is power.
mapa-kamino.howToGet: Open the dashboard for the first time.

escritura-kamino.name: Kamino Deed
escritura-kamino.description: An active position. Your first protocol operation.
escritura-kamino.howToGet: Have an active loan on Kamino.

lente-clareza.name: Clarity Lens
lente-clareza.description: You came back 3 times. Attention is a skill.
lente-clareza.howToGet: Return to the dashboard and read your status 3 times.

escudo-serenidade.name: Serenity Shield
escudo-serenidade.description: The market shook, you didn't. Resilience unlocked.
escudo-serenidade.howToGet: Survive an attention period without being liquidated.

lamina-coragem.name: Courage Blade
lamina-coragem.description: Real danger, real calm. You faced the worst.
lamina-coragem.howToGet: Survive a danger period with composure.

orbe-vigilancia.name: Vigilance Orb
orbe-vigilancia.description: 7 consecutive days of monitoring. Discipline forged.

grimorio-basico.name: Basic Grimoire
grimorio-basico.description: You learned what the Health Factor means. Knowledge is protection.
grimorio-basico.howToGet: Read the Health Factor explanation on the dashboard.

runa-acao.name: Action Rune

runa-acao.howToGet: Execute an action recommended by Nudge.

emblema-mentora.name: Mentor Emblem
emblema-mentora.description: You referred Nudge. Helping others is the highest level.

selo-solana.name: Solana Seal
selo-solana.description: Your profile was registered on-chain. Immutable proof on the blockchain.
selo-solana.howToGet: Register your profile on Solana during onboarding.

body.gentle: Did you know you can use your tokens as collateral to borrow crypto? On Kamino, Nudge monitors everything for you in real time. When you feel ready, we're here.
body.encouraging: Did you know you can use your tokens as collateral to borrow crypto? Kamino does this and Nudge monitors everything for you. It's simpler than it looks!
body.direct: Collateral-backed crypto lending on Kamino. Nudge monitors your position in real time.
body.technical: Kamino Lending: on-chain lending protocol. Deposit collateral, take a loan. Nudge monitors HF automatically.
